description_long: This is a single women's wedge-heeled shoe featuring a closed back, open toe, and a thin strap with a metallic buckle crossing over the instep. The upper appears to be made of smooth, matte synthetic or leather material in a dark color, while the interior lining is a lighter beige. The wedge heel is solid and tapers slightly toward the back, providing both height and stability. The shoe's design is elegant and suitable for both casual and semi-formal urban settings. There are no visible logos or brand markings, and the overall condition appears clean and well-maintained.
description: A dark-colored women's wedge-heeled shoe with an open toe, thin instep strap, and smooth matte finish. The shoe is clean and in good condition.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the open toe, thin instep strap with buckle, and beige interior lining.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the wedge heel, smooth upper, and the strap crossing the instep.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the closed back and the full height of the wedge heel.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the wedge heel and strap, with the buckle more visible.
